questionHtml: Outline why cellulose is an essential part of human diet.
markschemeHtml:
Any two of:

helps food pass through intestine

OR

adds bulk/dietary fibre ✔

 

reduces appetite

OR

helps prevent obesity ✔

 

prevents constipation

OR

reduces risk of hemorrhoids/diverticulosis/Crohn’s disease/irritable bowel syndrome/bowel cancer ✔

meta.title: Outline why cellulose is an essential part of human diet.
